install.windows_download: Open https://code.visualstudio.com/Download in the browser, click 'Windows x64 User Installer'. Saves to %USERPROFILE%\Downloads by default.
install.macos_download: Open https://code.visualstudio.com/Download in the browser, click 'macOS Universal'. Saves to ~/Downloads by default.
install.linux_apt: sudo apt install code (after adding the Microsoft apt repo per https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/setup/linux)
install.linux_download: Open https://code.visualstudio.com/Download in the browser and download the .deb / .rpm matching the user's distro.
install.note: GUI IDE — installation completes through a graphical wizard on Windows / macOS. Always tell the user the download location and ask them to follow the installer.

install_flow.summary: winget / brew / snap if available → otherwise download installer → user runs the wizard
agent_steps: Windows: prefer `winget install --id Microsoft.VisualStudioCode` if winget is available — silent install.
macOS: prefer `brew install --cask visual-studio-code` if Homebrew is available.
Linux: prefer `snap install --classic code` if snap is available, otherwise the apt/dnf package per the official docs.
Manual fallback: download the installer to the user's Downloads folder using `Invoke-WebRequest` (Windows) or `curl -L -o` (macOS/Linux).
After download finishes, tell the user the EXACT file path.
Open the installer (`Start-Process` on Windows, `open` on macOS).
Tell the user: 'VS Code 安装向导已打开,请按向导点击下一步完成安装。' / 'The VS Code installer is open — follow the wizard to finish.'
Do NOT try to automate the GUI wizard.
tell_user: That the installer was opened or that the package manager is installing silently
That Echobird does NOT switch models for VS Code — model selection lives in the user's chosen AI extension
